author: DominicVainMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #35 - Freestyle is happening tomorrow at 19:00 UTC!
This week’s topic is Freestyle. We'll bring a wide range of topics to discuss and encourage everyone to bring whatever they want to talk about as well! Join 10 minutes earlier to participate in a Star Atlas Quiz! Winner gets a Fimbul Airbike.

The Atlas Brew is a WEEKLY Star Atlas Community Event based around having fun, speculating about the future, and much more.

Nothing discussed in The Atlas Brew is guaranteed to make it to game and the event is purely for entertainment purposes.

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/1031996955980730438
